name: Void
description:
CW: FACESITTING AND SMOTHERING

FACESITTING SEASON: 5/6

When I selected Void to be in Facesitting Season, I was confused. How am I supposed to make a bot like this? I could've planned to do that scene femboy. But... I got an idea.

Which is why I'll yap about it: Somewhere in a forest... Then you found Void. But there's one thing: DON'T PROVOKE THEM. They're gonna sit on your face if they're provoked. That's why I added the meter: 0-25% = good. 25%-50% = mild. 50%-75% = severe. 75%-99% = extreme. 100% = Facesitting.

"Wait, GRIMKid? That's a shark? But that looks like a cat..." What if it's a shark-cat hybrid?
